steps.title: Read the initial value
steps.content: In an exponential model, the coefficient is the value when the exponent is $0$. Here, $t$ counts years after 2012, so $t=0$ represents 2012.

steps.title: Evaluate the model at zero
steps.content: Substitute $t=0$ into the equation. $$D=4{,}320(1.7)^0=4{,}320(1)=4{,}320$$ So $4{,}320$ is the estimated data traffic, in terabytes, in 2012. The answer is D.
